generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "The motor component of the MABI MAX 100 robot's first vertical axis, driving the cycloidal gearbox through direct mounting."
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "The cycloidal gearbox component of the MABI MAX 100 robot's first vertical axis, receiving power from the motor and transmitting motion to the robot's drive train."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted motor encoder measuring motor position for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring gearwheel rotational position to reduce positional uncertainty."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearwheelPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller sensor measuring input current (I_M) of the motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearwheelPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearwheelPositionData
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearwheelPositionData
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance IdealSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing ideal system behavior (torque/velocity without friction) for the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics for the robot's drive train."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Dahl friction characteristics for the gearbox system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing LuGre friction characteristics for the robot's drive train components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data (τ_M) from motor current and position measurements for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity data (ω_M) from position measurements for the motor and gearwheel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque traces (τ_G) for the gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox outputs derived from friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData StribeckFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData DahlFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData LuGreFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomDashboard
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity traces (ω_G) for the gearbox outputs derived from friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData StribeckFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData DahlFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData LuGreFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomDashboard
]

instance FrictionDeviationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data traces comparing measured vs. simulated torque/velocity to detect friction deviations in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomDashboard
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool used for creating structural (Block Definition Diagrams) and behavioral models of the robot's first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables IdealSystemModel
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink platform for executable simulation models of friction and system dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:enables CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:enables StribeckFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:enables DahlFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:enables LuGreFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:enables IdealSystemModel
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from encoders and motor current sensor to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:enables GearwheelPositionData
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorCurrentData
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom visualization dashboard integrating and analyzing data traces (measured vs. simulated torque/velocity) for friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionDeviationData
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizedControlParameters
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell framework providing traceability and semantic linking of physical measurements to virtual models."
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:enables GearwheelPositionData
    DTDFVocab:enables MeasuredTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulatedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:enables MeasuredVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulatedVelocityData
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction identification service using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) implemented in MATLAB Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionDetection
    DTDFVocab:provides KineticFrictionDetection
    DTDFVocab:provides ViscousFrictionDetection
]

instance DynamicModelExchange : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic model exchange service for continuous refinement of friction models during operation, enabling adaptive control algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelRefinement
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyOptimization
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard service for integrating and analyzing data traces (measured vs. simulated torque/velocity) to detect friction deviations."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDeviationAnalysis
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterOptimization
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StaticFrictionDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static friction in the gearbox to adjust control algorithms dynamically."
]

instance KineticFrictionDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of kinetic friction in the gearbox to improve motion accuracy during operation."
]

instance ViscousFrictionDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of viscous friction characteristics in the drive train to optimize robot control parameters."
]

instance FrictionModelRefinement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous refinement of friction models based on live data to improve simulation accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotionAccuracyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of motion accuracy parameters based on real-time friction detection and model updates."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionDeviationAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of deviations between measured and simulated torque/velocity data to detect anomalies (wear, tool changes)."
]

instance OptimizedControlParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates to friction models and motion control parameters based on continuous data-driven learning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlParameterOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated optimization of control parameters to minimize friction-induced positioning errors."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator
    base:contains GearboxActuator
    base:contains MotorEncoder
    base:contains GearboxEncoder
    base:contains MotorCurrentSensor
    base:contains IdealSystemModel
    base:contains CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    base:contains StribeckFrictionModel
    base:contains DahlFrictionModel
    base:contains LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates in **real-time** with:
  - **Operational synchronization** tied to robot control loops, ensuring data consistency with physical system dynamics.
  - **Sub-second latency** for live data processing and friction model updates, though exact frequencies (e.g., ~1 kHz) are not specified. The focus is on **continuous, adaptive friction modeling** during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - A **centralized digital shadow** for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, incorporating:
    - **Physical system**: Motor, gearbox, and encoders.
    - **Virtual models**: SysML structural models, Simulink friction models, and AAS for traceability.
    - **Data processing**: Processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) that link measured data to simulated outputs.
  The constellation does not include external DTs or horizontal integrations with other systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates primarily during the **operational phase** of the robot, specifically for:
  - **As-operated** representation, where friction models are continuously refined based on real-time data.
  The digital shadow is not explicitly tied to design or manufacturing stages, though it supports **continuous improvement** of control algorithms during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Traceability**: Data traces are linked to their sources (e.g., encoders, simulation models) via **Asset Administration Shells (AAS)** and SysML models, ensuring transparency.
  - **Model validation**: Friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) are validated against real-time sensor data to account for wear, load, and environmental factors.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Differences between measured and simulated data are analyzed to infer friction losses, with no explicit mention of formal uncertainty quantification methods in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical and virtual systems uses:
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time data streaming from sensors (motor current, angle, torque/velocity).
  - **SysML models** for structural and behavioral representation of the first axis.
  - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for executable simulation models of friction and system dynamics."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is not explicitly hosted on the robot’s CNC controller. Instead, data is **streamed via MQTT** from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller to an external system for processing, simulation, and visualization. The DT infrastructure is separate from the CNC hardware."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
   - **SysML** for structural modeling,
   - **Asset Administration Shells (AAS)** for data linking,
   - **MQTT** for data communication,
   - No explicit mention of ISO/IEC 42010, IIoT-IS, or OASIS standards in the provided documents."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
   - **Safety Cell Constraints**: The robot’s working range is restricted to [-90°, 90°] by the safety cell,
   - **Operational Safety**: The digital shadow is passive (one-way data flow), ensuring no autonomous actions or remote control risks,
   - **No Encrypted MQTT**: Not explicitly mentioned; the focus is on real-time data streaming without specific security protocols."
]
